description_cn: 将两个面对齐，使它们共面且方向一致。常用于网格优化和曲面拼接。
description_en: Align two faces to be coplanar with the same orientation. Commonly used for mesh optimization and surface stitching.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

parameters.name: Tolerance
parameters.desc_cn: 对齐精度，值越小越精确
parameters.desc_en: Alignment tolerance, smaller value gives higher precision

author: Kangaroo Team
